name: python3-freetype
title: python3-freetype
description:
Freetype Python bindings for Python 3
Freetype Python provides bindings for the FreeType library.
Only the high-level API is bound.
.
All the font access is done through the FreeType2 library,
which supports many formats.  It can render images of characters with
high-quality hinting and antialiasing, extract metrics information, and
extract the outlines of characters in scalable formats like TrueType.
.
This is the Python 3 version of the package.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-freetype because Freetype Python bindings for Python 3.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-freetype as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-freetype with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-freetype --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
